_meta.description: Catalog of ALL dome model predictions — confirmed (WINs), prospective, pending, falsified, refined. This is our tracking ledger, not the dome's. Every prediction the dome registers gets an entry here. Counts are computed at build time and injected into HTML via {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens.

pipeline.poller: Detects new predictions on dome site (hard rule: >=5 new = critical). Logs to change records.
pipeline.analyst: Mode 0 expanded: catalogs new predictions here with testability assessment. One entry per prediction.
pipeline.decider: Triages analyst entries, updates outcomes when test windows close, routes to curmudgeon for review.
pipeline.curmudgeon: Reviews testability assessments and derivation claims.
pipeline.build: generate-html.js reads this file, computes counts, injects into HTML via placeholders.

placeholders.{{PRED_PROSPECTIVE}}: Predictions with cryptographic timestamps registered before data pull
placeholders.{{PRED_PENDING}}: Predictions awaiting test window or data
placeholders.{{PRED_CONFIRMED}}: Predictions confirmed by data (overlap with wins.json WINs)
placeholders.{{PRED_FALSIFIED}}: Predictions falsified by data (overlap with uncounted-failures.json)
placeholders.{{PRED_EXPIRED}}: Test window closed with no data or ambiguous result
placeholders.{{PRED_STD_RELABEL}}: Predictions that are standard physics relabeled (our assessment)
placeholders.{{PRED_TESTABLE}}: Predictions with specific, measurable test criteria
placeholders.{{PRED_DOME_DERIVED}}: Predictions genuinely derived from dome geometry (our assessment)
placeholders.{{PRED_ACTIVE_WINDOWS}}: Predictions with test windows open right now
placeholders.{{PRED_RECYCLED}}: Predictions that restate already-confirmed WINs with new timestamps

recycling_detection.restates_win: WIN ID (e.g. 'WIN-068') if this prediction restates an already-confirmed WIN, null otherwise. This is the primary recycling indicator.
recycling_detection.data_predates_registration: Boolean. True if the underlying observational data was published or available before the dome's registration date. Distinguishes genuinely prospective predictions from timestamped retrodictions.
recycling_detection.crypto_hash: SHA-256 hex string from dome's registration (if provided). Hash formula claimed: SHA256('ECM V51.0 {ID}: {text} on {date}T00:00:00Z'). No independent verification mechanism exists.
recycling_detection.registration_date: ISO date when dome registered the prediction (from git commit or claimed date)

summary.notes: Complete catalog of ALL dome predictions from john09289.github.io/predictions/. Includes recycled predictions (restating WINs), logging-only items, falsified, and pending. 86 entries cataloged.
